eval_name: I need a Figure 1 with 4 panels for my Nature paper: (a) PCA
prompt: I need a Figure 1 with 4 panels for my Nature paper: (a) PCA plot showing sample clustering by treatment group, (b) training loss curves for 3 models over 100 epochs, (c) heatmap of top 20 differentially expressed genes (rows) x 6 samples (columns), (d) bar chart comparing accuracy of 4 methods. Each panel has inline simulated data.
